description: Scenes are generated from randomized canvas geometry: hidden target coordinates, hidden decoy glyphs, lens radius, clutter strokes, grain, palette, and accepted click radius. No raster image files are used.
challenge_randomization: The server regenerates the current challenge on each /state request and after failed submissions. Explicit seeds remain only as a developer debugging hook.
notes: The public browser state contains render geometry. Hidden ground truth records only the accepted target coordinate and radius.
